description: PRD-003 — Complementar planos IA: comentários, checkins de execução, processamento assíncrono

userStories.title: Criar migration para plan_comments
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a table to store user comments on AI plans.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration for plan_comments table: id (uuid PK), ai_plan_id (foreign uuid), user_id (foreign uuid), scope (enum: plan|day|exercise|meal), target_id (uuid nullable), content (text), resolved_at (timestamp nullable), created_at, updated_at
Migration runs successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Criar migration para plan_checkins
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a table to track plan item completions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration for plan_checkins table: id (uuid PK), user_id (foreign uuid), ai_plan_id (foreign uuid), checkable_type (string), checkable_id (uuid), notes (text nullable), difficulty (tinyint 1-5 nullable), completed_at (timestamp), created_at
Migration runs successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Criar models PlanComment e PlanCheckin
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Eloquent models for the new tables.
acceptanceCriteria: Create PlanComment model with UUID, fillable, belongsTo AiPlan
Create PlanCheckin model with UUID, fillable, belongsTo AiPlan and User
Add hasMany relationships to AiPlan model
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar endpoints de comentários em planos
userStories.description: As a user, I want to comment on my AI plan to request refinements.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /v1/plans/{planId}/comments — create comment with: content, scope, target_id
GET /v1/plans/{planId}/comments — list comments for plan
Add routes in api.php
Validate plan belongs to authenticated user
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar refinamento de plano via IA com comentários
userStories.description: As a user, I want the AI to refine my plan based on my comments.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /v1/plans/{planId}/refine — triggers AI refinement using unresolved comments
Creates new AiPlan record with incremented version
Marks processed comments as resolved
Limit: max 3 refinements per plan per day
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check if ai_plans table has version column. Add migration if not.

userStories.title: Implementar checkins de execução nos planos
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark plan items as completed.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /v1/plans/{planId}/checkin — create checkin with: checkable_type, checkable_id, notes, difficulty
GET /v1/plans/{planId}/checkins — list checkins with summary stats (total, completed, adherence %)
Prevent duplicate checkins for same item on same day
Add routes in api.php
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Converter geração de planos para processamento assíncrono
userStories.description: As a developer, I need plan generation to be async via Laravel Queue.
acceptanceCriteria: Create GenerateWorkoutPlanJob with logic from AiPlanController@generateWorkout
Create GenerateMealPlanJob with logic from AiMealPlanController@generateMealPlan
Controllers dispatch job and return 202 Accepted with job_id
Add GET /v1/plans/jobs/{jobId} endpoint to check job status
Jobs retry up to 3 times on failure
Typecheck passes
